description: Update a specific equipemnt timecard entry.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the equipment timecard entry

crew_id.description: ID of the crew the equipment timecard entry is associated with.

created_at.description: The date and time the equipment timecard entry was created.

created_by_id.description: ID of the user who created the equipment timecard entry.

date.description: The date for the equipment timecard entry.

equipment_id.description: Id of the equipment the equipment timecard entry is associated with.

location_id.description: ID of the location the equipment timecard entry is associated with.

party_id.description: ID of the party the equipment timecard entry is associated with (ie, operator).

project_id.description: ID of the project the equipment timecard entry is associated with.

quantity.description: Total number of hours/days/weeks the equipment was on site.

idle_quantity.description: Total number of hours/days/weeks the equipment was idle on site.

timesheet_id.description: ID of the timesheet the equipment timecard entry is associated with.

unit_of_measure.description: Enum that represents the unit of measure for provided quantity.

updated_at.description: The date and time the equipment timecard entry was last updated.

wbs_code_id.description: ID of the WBS code, the equipment timecard entry is associated with.

timesheet_id.description: The unique identifier of the timesheet associated with the equipment timecard entry.

wbs_code_id.description: The Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) code associated with the equipment timecard entry.

date.description: The date of the timecard entry in ISO 8601 format.

equipment_id.description: The unique identifier of the equipment associated with the equipment timecard entry.

location_id.description: The unique identifier of the location associated with the equipment timecard entry.

crew_id.description: The unique identifier of the crew associated with the equipment timecard entry.

party_id.description: The unique identifier of the party associated with the equipment timecard entry.

quantity.description: The quantity of hours worked for the equipment timecard entry.

idle_quantity.description: The quantity of hours the equipment was idle for the equipment timecard entry.

unit_of_measure.description: The unit of measure for the quantity, typically 'hours'.
